home.tagline: I explore the frontier of Vibe Coding — turning ideas into products with AI. This is where I document my experiments, reflections, and discoveries.

about.title: About
about.description: A developer accelerating creation through AI
about.bio: I'm Long Jiang, a software engineer passionate about AI-driven development. I believe Vibe Coding is transforming how we create software — collaborating with AI allows us to turn ideas into reality faster than ever. This site documents my explorations, experiments, and thoughts in this new paradigm.
